contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a batadv_orig_ifinfo object. After calling this function, the caller must not use the orig_ifinfo pointer. When the reference count reaches zero, the object is freed via the provided release callback. The NULL check allows safe calling with a NULL pointer (no-op). The caller must have previously acquired a reference (e.g., via a get function) and must ensure proper synchronization of refcount operations between threads.
